name: Cortis
description:
CORTIS's concept, derived from "COLOR OUTSIDE THE LINES," is about radical authenticity, breaking industry norms, and raw creativity, focusing on self-production, personal stories, and embracing imperfection unlike hyper-polished kpop which brand themselves as 'GEN-Z creators'. It is a group of teens/late teens.

Debuted in August 18, 2025

Consists of six members — James, Juhoon, Martin, You, Seonghyeon and Keonho.

The name for their fans is coer(singular)/coers(plural).
creator: ohitspooty
